# urllo_host (Data Source)

Fetches a single source host by `id` or `name`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a single host by name (or by id).
data "urllo_host" "example" {
  name = "www.example.com"
}

output "host_dns_status" {
  value = data.urllo_host.example.dns_status
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Host identifier. One of `id` or `name` is required.
- `name` (String) Hostname. One of `id` or `name` is required.

### Read-Only

- `acme_enabled` (Boolean) Whether automatic SSL is enabled.
- `certificate_status` (String) Certificate status.
- `detected_dns_entries` (Attributes List) Currently detected DNS records. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--detected_dns_entries))
- `dns_status` (String) DNS configuration status.
- `dns_tested_at` (String) When DNS was last tested.
- `match_options` (Attributes) How source URLs are matched. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--match_options))
- `not_found_action` (Attributes) Behaviour when no matching redirect is found. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--not_found_action))
- `required_dns_entries` (Attributes) DNS records required for this host. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--required_dns_entries))
- `security` (Attributes) HTTPS and HSTS security settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--security))

<a id="nestedatt--detected_dns_entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `detected_dns_entries`

Read-Only:

- `type` (String) DNS record type.
- `values` (List of String) Record values.


<a id="nestedatt--match_options"></a>
### Nested Schema for `match_options`

Read-Only:

- `case_insensitive` (Boolean) Ignore case.
- `slash_insensitive` (Boolean) Ignore trailing slashes.


<a id="nestedatt--not_found_action"></a>
### Nested Schema for `not_found_action`

Read-Only:

- `forward_params` (Boolean) Copy source query parameters.
- `forward_path` (Boolean) Copy the source path.
- `response_code` (Number) Response code (301/302/404).
- `response_url` (String) Redirect target for 301/302.


<a id="nestedatt--required_dns_entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `required_dns_entries`

Read-Only:

- `alternatives` (Attributes List) Alternative acceptable DNS records. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--required_dns_entries--alternatives))
- `recommended` (Attributes) Recommended DNS record. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--required_dns_entries--recommended))
- `verification` (Attributes) Ownership verification record. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--required_dns_entries--verification))

<a id="nestedatt--required_dns_entries--alternatives"></a>
### Nested Schema for `required_dns_entries.alternatives`

Read-Only:

- `type` (String) DNS record type.
- `values` (List of String) Record values.


<a id="nestedatt--required_dns_entries--recommended"></a>
### Nested Schema for `required_dns_entries.recommended`

Read-Only:

- `type` (String) DNS record type.
- `values` (List of String) Record values.


<a id="nestedatt--required_dns_entries--verification"></a>
### Nested Schema for `required_dns_entries.verification`

Read-Only:

- `record` (String) Record name.
- `type` (String) Record type.
- `value` (String) Challenge value.



<a id="nestedatt--security"></a>
### Nested Schema for `security`

Read-Only:

- `hsts_include_sub_domains` (Boolean) Apply HSTS to subdomains.
- `hsts_max_age` (Number) HSTS max-age in seconds.
- `hsts_preload` (Boolean) Include HSTS preload directive.
- `https_upgrade` (Boolean) Upgrade HTTP to HTTPS.
- `prevent_foreign_embedding` (Boolean) Prevent foreign embedding.
